  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "Which of the following is an example of a structural design in Verilog HDL?",
      "options": ["A) A single hardware description, B) A combinational logic circuit", "B) A sequential logic circuit", "C) A combinational logic circuit", "D) A mixed logic circuit"],
      "correct": 1,
      "explanation": "Structural design in Verilog involves describing the logic circuit using a series of connections between modules, rather than specifying the behavior
